text.content: MAXAM ANNOUNCES THE OPENING OF A NEW DISTRIBUTION CENTER

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM ANNOUNCES THE OPENING OF A NEW DISTRIBUTION CENTER

text.content: Major expansion of MAXAM’s Warehouse capacity through the addition of an all-new Houston Location

rich_text.plain_text: Major expansion of MAXAM’s Warehouse capacity through the addition of an all-new Houston Location

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, February 28th, 2023] MAXAM Tire, a global leader in manufacturing specialty tires, announces its new warehouse facility in Houston, Texas. Executing its major expansion plan, MAXAM Tire’s new facility in Houston features 244,000 square feet of warehouse space, carrying the momentum of growing global demands across specialty tire segments. MAXAM Tire’s third warehouse facility in the U.S. marks another milestone in the company’s success and growth within the industry over the past few years.

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, February 28th, 2023] MAXAM Tire, a global leader in manufacturing specialty tires, announces its new warehouse facility in Houston, Texas. Executing its major expansion plan, MAXAM Tire’s new facility in Houston features 244,000 square feet of warehouse space, carrying the momentum of growing global demands across specialty tire segments. MAXAM Tire’s third warehouse facility in the U.S. marks another milestone in the company’s success and growth within the industry over the past few years.

text.content: MAXAM Tire believes in being the customer’s true business solutions provider, ensuring that the highest level of quality experience is met. By locating its third warehouse in Houston, Texas in addition to its existing warehouses in Los Angeles, California, and Memphis, Tennessee, MAXAM strategically expands its efficiency in meeting customers’ needs with a multidirectional logistic approach. This allows MAXAM to supply products with maximum efficiency, fulfilling its mission of being a true business solutions provider.

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire believes in being the customer’s true business solutions provider, ensuring that the highest level of quality experience is met. By locating its third warehouse in Houston, Texas in addition to its existing warehouses in Los Angeles, California, and Memphis, Tennessee, MAXAM strategically expands its efficiency in meeting customers’ needs with a multidirectional logistic approach. This allows MAXAM to supply products with maximum efficiency, fulfilling its mission of being a true business solutions provider.

text.content: “Houston, our third warehouse, will have one of the largest SKU assortments of any of our current warehouses, making it easier than ever for customers to receive products when they need them. Houston is a rapidly expanding and efficient area, with easy access to both major ports, interstates, and rail systems. This is an exciting time to locate a facility here, and we look forward to becoming a part of this community,” says Derick Efird, National Distribution & Logistics Manager for MAXAM Tire.

rich_text.plain_text: “Houston, our third warehouse, will have one of the largest SKU assortments of any of our current warehouses, making it easier than ever for customers to receive products when they need them. Houston is a rapidly expanding and efficient area, with easy access to both major ports, interstates, and rail systems. This is an exciting time to locate a facility here, and we look forward to becoming a part of this community,” says Derick Efird, National Distribution & Logistics Manager for MAXAM Tire.

text.content: With full operation scheduled to start at the end of March 2023, MAXAM believes this warehouse will enable the company to better serve its dealers and customers logistically in all aspects. Featuring a large storage capacity in an ideal location, MAXAM is committed to delivering innovative solutions that provide top-tier service to customers.
